dominant_theme: Dependency management and version compatibility issues are the most critical pain point across AI frameworks.
summary: AI developers face severe challenges with dependency hell, version incompatibilities, and breaking changes across major frameworks like LangChain, OpenAI, and LlamaIndex. Async/streaming reliability issues compound these problems, causing production failures. Additionally, structured output parsing inconsistencies and lack of comprehensive support for non-OpenAI models create friction in workflows. These structural issues prevent developers from upgrading safely and force them into deprecated dependency versions.

painpoints.title: Dependency version conflicts and compatibility hell
painpoints.description: Multiple framework updates introduce cascading dependency issues where upgrading one library breaks others. Examples include tenacity 8.4.0 breaking LangChain and LlamaIndex, and version constraints creating impossible resolution scenarios. Developers are forced to pin deprecated versions to maintain stability.
sample_quotes: It's literally impossible to fix this issue without intervention from LLAMA INDEX team
Please upgrade its dep -> llama-index-vector-stores-chroma 0.0.1 depends on llama-index-core<0.10.0 and >=0.9.32

painpoints.title: Breaking changes in minor/patch version updates
painpoints.description: Libraries introduce breaking changes in supposedly backward-compatible releases (1.99.2, 0.10.6, 0.4.2), forcing developers to handle regressions unexpectedly. Type changes, removed parameters, and API shifts occur without major version bumps.
sample_quotes: This bug fix commit introduces a breaking change in 1.99.2
OpenAI broken in 0.10.6
Bedrock Converse Chat with Tools is throwing error in latest release 0.4.2

painpoints.title: Async/streaming timeouts and connection failures
painpoints.description: Asynchronous workflows and long-running streams consistently fail with timeouts and connection errors after 5+ minutes or multiple calls. Issues include InvalidChunkLength errors and connection drops during streaming responses.
sample_quotes: Constant timeouts after multiple asynchronous calls
Streaming output from gpt4 consistently fails with Connection broken: InvalidChunkLength after 5 minutes

painpoints.title: Structured output parsing inconsistencies
painpoints.description: LLM structured output features inconsistently return strings instead of expected Pydantic models or fail with advanced schemas. Parsing failures leave developers without fallback mechanisms for handling unpredictable output formats.
sample_quotes: Structured Output sometimes return string instead of Pydantic Model
Google Generative AI Structured Output doesn't work with advanced schema

painpoints.title: Callback and monitoring integration breaks
painpoints.description: Cost tracking and monitoring features like get_openai_callback stop working after framework updates, breaking observability and cost management workflows critical for production systems.
sample_quotes: get_openai_callback not working when using Agent Executor after updating to latest version

painpoints.title: Limited non-OpenAI model support and abstraction
painpoints.description: While OpenAI models are well-supported, alternative LLM providers lack consistent integration, forcing developers to write custom adapters or switch frameworks to support Bedrock, PaLM, or other models.
sample_quotes: Enhanced support of non-OpenAI models
Bedrock Converse Chat with Tools is throwing error

painpoints.title: Missing or incomplete streaming implementation
painpoints.description: Streaming support is incomplete or missing entirely in key frameworks, limiting ability to build responsive real-time AI applications and handle long-running operations gracefully.
sample_quotes: Streaming support
Add support to streaming function call
Stream error after 5 minutes

painpoints.title: Unreliable source attribution in retrieval systems
painpoints.description: RetrievalQA chains and similar features provide inaccurate or unreliable source citations, undermining transparency and making it difficult to verify AI-generated answers in production applications.
sample_quotes: RetrievalQAWithSourcesChain provides unreliable sources
sources component is not providing transparency into what documents the retriever

painpoints.title: HTTP client library incompatibilities and proxy issues
painpoints.description: Updates to underlying HTTP libraries (httpx) remove deprecated parameters that frameworks still depend on, requiring developers to manually handle compatibility gaps or fork dependencies.
sample_quotes: httpx version 0.28.0 removes the deprecated proxies argument
Use of proxies kwarg in httpx==0.28.0

painpoints.title: Complex agent tool execution patterns
painpoints.description: Multi-agent frameworks like AutoGen enforce rigid code generation and execution patterns that don't support simple tool invocation workflows, forcing developers to work around framework design assumptions.
sample_quotes: Autogen heavily works on the concept of generating code and executing it. Does it not have a simple way of executing code directly after it has been selected?
